candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current assets balancing item, not current assets.
Non-current assets total, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported current assets total.

candidates.why: Possible cash line, but appears blank in preview and is less standard than the explicit cash equivalents line.
Direct match for cash and cash equivalents on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement line, not the balance sheet stock variable requested.

candidates.row_label: Exchange difference in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Not the cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Matches cash balance conceptually, but balance-sheet line is preferred for CHE.
Not cash and cash equivalents.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash balance; duplicate label appears in preview, so listed once as required.

candidates.why: Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Direct match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Balancing item, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities balancing item, not current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities total, not current liabilities.

candidates.why: Direct match for current maturities of long-term debt; aligns with STD and excludes leases.
Current lease liability, but leases should be excluded from baseline STD.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose current maturities of long-term debt. Excluded lease-related row per STD baseline rule.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

Only a minor component, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Disposal of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow item, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Investments of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Capex cash flow, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working-capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities
candidates.why: Despite the awkward label, values equal operating cash flow after working-capital changes and before investing/financing; best match for net cash from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities

variables.notes: Chose the line representing total operating cash flow. The label is awkward, but the amounts reconcile as operating cash flow before investing activities.
